site.title: Apparel & Team Wea | ION Print & Promo
site.description: Custom apparel, t-shirts, uniforms, aprons, sportswear, jerseys, safety wear & more in Barrie, Muskoka, and the GTA. Fast turnaround, competitive pricing, and high-quality branding.

hero.title: Custom Apparel
hero.imageAlt: Custom apparel and team wear printing services

centreText.title: Wear Your Brand
centreText.description: Shop our selection of customizable clothing, workwear, team gear, and much more. Available in a range of styles, sizes, and colours, with branding options to match your business and budget.

featureImage.imageAlt: Custom branded apparel and team wear

features.title: Clothing & Jackets
features.description:
Outfit your staff, volunteers, or team with amazing branded clothing that looks sharp, wears well, and keeps your brand top of mind.

  • T-shirts, short & long sleeve
  • Hoodies & sweatshirts
  • Quarter zips & pullovers
  • Jackets & outerwear

Visit our showroom at 178 Tiffin St. in Barrie to check out colours, sizes, and styles.

features.title: Uniforms & Safety Wear
features.description:
We've got workwear made from durable materials and CSA-compliant options available. Built for Canadian conditions and hardworking crews.

  • High-visibility safety vests
  • Reflective jackets & outerwear
  • Branded uniforms, vests & aprons
  • Construction & industrial workwear

Our branded uniforms and safety wear help your team look professional while staying visible and ready for the job.

features.title: Team Gear & Sports Apparel
features.description:
Proudly outfitting Simcoe County, Muskoka, and GTA sports teams and clubs with customized jerseys, practice gear, and fan apparel.

  • Team jerseys & practice shirts
  • Hoodies & warm-up apparel
  • Hats, scarves & fun fan merch
  • Tournament & event swag

We are the outfitters trusted by Barrie Soccer, Ontario Soccer, and more.
